# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docAfter:
# Technical Spec
## Introduction
This document outlines the features and capabilities of our markdown editor, providing technical specifications for developers to use.

It serves as a reference guide, detailing the inner workings and design decisions behind the editor.
## Architecture

The system uses three layers.
